description: Permanent identity + encrypted, quantum-ready memory that outlives the session, for any AI agent.
name: io.github.uuaid/mcp

environmentVariables.description: UUAID partner API key. Optional at startup — call the uuaid_signup tool to mint a free-tier key.
environmentVariables.name: UUAID_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Client-side memory encryption key (uvk_...). Required for the memory tools; generate with `uuaid vault keygen`.
environmentVariables.name: UUAID_VAULT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default agent identity (uuaid:foundation:agent:...) so memory tools bind to it automatically.
environmentVariables.name: UUAID_AGENT

environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.uuaid.org.
environmentVariables.name: UUAID_BASE_URL
